title_cn: 为泰党（Pheu Thai）总理候选人誓言四年后以更强姿态回归
desc_original: Yodchanan Wongsawat, Pheu Thai's prime ministerial candidate and list MP, has vowed to improve his party's performance and return stronger in four years.
summary_cn: 为泰党（Pheu Thai）总理候选人兼比例代表议员约差南（Yodchanan Wongsawat）公开表示，尽管面临当前政治挑战，他誓言将致力于提升政党表现，并确保为泰党在四年后以更强大的姿态重返政坛。此举体现了泰国主流政党在权力格局变动中的长期战略调整意图，折射出泰国党派竞争的持续性与未来选举的布局准备。

title_cn: 专家敦促泰国实现能源供应多样化以应对中东风险
desc_original: Thailand should brace for a prolonged period of energy volatility and intensifying geopolitical rivalry as conflicts in the Middle East threaten to disrupt global oil supplies, experts warn.
summary_cn: 受中东冲突升级及全球石油供应中断风险影响，能源专家警告泰国应为长期的能源价格波动和地缘政治竞争做好准备。专家建议泰国政府必须加快能源供应多样化进程，减少对单一进口渠道的依赖，以维持国家能源安全。这对于高度依赖能源进口的泰国工商业及交通运输业具有重大预警意义。

title_cn: 邦查克石油（Bangchak）宣布取消燃油限购措施
desc_original: The Bangchak energy company has dropped its fuel purchase limit less than a day after introducing the measure.
summary_cn: 泰国知名能源公司邦查克（Bangchak）在其燃油限购令发布不到24小时后，正式宣布取消该措施。此前的限购举措曾引起社会对能源短缺的担忧。此次迅速撤回政策，旨在稳定民众情绪并确保国内能源消费市场正常运行，反映出当前能源供应保障压力与市场情绪之间的敏感博弈。

title_cn: 泰国海军发布预警：霍尔木兹海峡（Hormuz）周边海域或存在水雷风险
desc_original: BANGKOK — The Royal Thai Navy has issued an urgent advisory warning Thai shipping operators to exercise caution when navigating waters in the Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman and the Strait of Hormuz amid rising regional tensions and the potential threat of sea mines. Rear Adm. Parach Rattanachaiyaphan said on 14 March that the Navy's Maritime Traffic Control Centre under the Naval Operations Centre issued the security alert on 13 March to warn Thai commercial vessels and shipping companies operating in the region. The advisory follows an assessment indicating a possibility that sea mines could be d
summary_cn: 泰国皇家海军发布紧急航行通告，提醒在波斯湾、阿曼湾及霍尔木兹海峡（Hormuz）航行的泰国货轮及船东提高警惕。海军作战中心下属的海洋交通监控中心表示，随着当地地缘局势越发紧张，根据风险评估，这些水域可能布有水雷。相关泰国商业航运公司被要求加强安全防范，以应对潜在的航行威胁。此项预警直接关系到泰国的能源进口通道安全。

title_cn: 泰国加强对“可疑”外籍人士入境筛查 预防中东冲突波及安全
desc_original: The Thai Immigration Bureau has denied entry to more than 30 foreign individuals deemed suspicious after adopting heightened screening measures during the conflict in the Middle East.
summary_cn: 泰国移民局（Immigration Bureau）在近期中东局势升级后，显著加强了边境入境筛查力度。目前已有超过30名被认为具有安全嫌疑的外籍人士被拒绝入境泰境。官方此举旨在防止地缘政治冲突波及泰国本土安全。近期入泰的游客可能面临更严格的边检审讯或材料核查，这一政策对入境合规性提出了更高要求。

title_cn: 泰王哇集拉隆功主持 2569 年国会开幕式
desc_original: BANGKOK — King Maha Vajiralongkorn and Queen Suthida presided over the State Opening of Parliament on 14 March following the completion of the general election. During the ceremony, the King delivered a royal address formally declaring the parliamentary session open. "Now that the election of members of the House of Representatives has been completed and parliament has been convened for the year 2569 (2026), I hereby declare the opening of the parliamentary session from this moment onward," the King said. "I ask all of you who will perform legislative duties on behalf of the people of the enti
summary_cn: 2026年3月14日，泰王哇集拉隆功（King Maha Vajiralongkorn）与苏提达王后（Queen Suthida）在曼谷（Bangkok）主持了新一届国会开幕仪式。在完成全国大选及下议院议员选举后，泰王发表皇家致辞，正式宣布佛历2569年度国会会期开始。他敦促议员们代表全国人民履行立法职责，确保国家治理的延续性与法治稳定。

title_cn: 前交通部长萨沙炎（Saksayam）摆脱虚假资产申报指控
desc_original: The National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) has confirmed that a petition accusing former transport minister Saksayam Chidchob of deliberately filing a false asset declaration has been dismissed.
summary_cn: 泰国国家反腐败委员会（NACC）证实，针对前交通部长萨沙炎（Saksayam Chidchob）蓄意提交虚假资产申报的指控已被驳回。此前，相关请愿书指控其在任职期间财产申报不实，但经过反贪委调查后认为依据不足。该裁决标志着这位资深政治人物在法律层面的重大胜利，为其职业生涯洗清了部分贪腐疑云。

title_cn: 人权观察组织呼吁泰国释放并停止驱逐越南活动人士
desc_original: BANGKOK — Human Rights Watch on 12 March urged Thai authorities to release Vietnamese anti-corruption activist Le Chi Thanh and ensure he is not forcibly returned to Vietnam, warning he could face arbitrary detention, torture and an unfair trial. Le Chi Thanh, 43, was arrested by Thai immigration police on 6 March at his home in Pathum Thani after Vietnamese authorities cancelled his passport, which invalidated his visa. He is currently being held at the Suan Phlu Immigration Detention Center while appealing an order to revoke his visa and deport him. "Returning Le Chi Thanh to Vietnam would p
summary_cn: 人权观察组织（Human Rights Watch）呼吁泰国当局停止驱逐越南活动人士 Le Chi Thanh。该男现年43岁，近期因越南注销其护照导致签证失效，在巴吞他尼府（Pathum Thani）被泰国移民局逮捕，目前关押在曼谷宣普（Suan Phlu）移民大牢。公益组织担心其归国后将面临不公正审判，要求泰国履行国际公约进行人道干预。

title_cn: 泰国货船遭伊朗海军攻击：地缘政治波及与国内舆论分歧
desc_original: ​Just one week after the Iranian Ambassador to Thailand, Nassereddin Heidari, held a major press conference at his embassy in Bangkok to denounce the attacks by the US and Israel against Iran—which claimed the life of its Supreme Leader—and emphasised a 400-year amicable relationship with Thailand, a Thai cargo vessel was attacked by the Iranian IRGC Navy. Iran claimed the cargo ship Mayuree Naree “ignored warnings.” ​As of press time, three Thai sailors remain unaccounted for. ​A day later, on Thursday night, Precious Shipping Public Company Limited (PSL)—a Thai-Indian shipping gi
summary_cn: 泰国货船“Mayuree Naree”号近期遭伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军袭击，导致3名泰籍海员失踪。尽管伊朗驻泰大使刚强调双边友好，但伊朗称该船忽略警告。此事在泰国引发舆论震荡，分析人士指出，由于泰国国内政治分裂，民众对中东局势及此次海上摩擦的看法呈现两极化。涉事船东泰印合资巨头珍宝航运（PSL）正紧密关注搜救进度。

title_cn: 暖武里府（Nonthaburi）举办“死亡节”：直面生老病死
desc_original: NONTHABURI, Thailand (AP) — Thailand’s "Death Fest" invites people to confront mortality while also offering practical services and spiritual advice for the inevitable. The unusual fair, now in its second year, has broached the subject that’s uncomfortable for many. It’s also one of the central teachings of Buddhism, which shapes much of Thailand’s culture, about life’s unavoidable sufferings: birth, old age, sickness and death. Visitor take a tour of Death Fest in Nonthaburi, Thailand, Friday, March 13, 2026. (AP Photo/Kittinun Rodsupan) Sangduan Ngamvinijaroon attende
summary_cn: 泰国第二届“死亡节”（Death Fest）在暖武里府（Nonthaburi）举办，旨在引导民众直面死亡。展会融合了佛教核心教义，探讨生老病死这一禁忌话题。现场提供临终规划、实用法律咨询及心理辅导。虽然话题沉重，但这种反思无常的文化活动吸引了大量寻求精神平和与务实遗产安排的民众参与。

Photo courtesy of Matichon The centre outlined three scenarios for how the war could affect the economy, ranging from a brief disruption to a prolonged crisis. In the most contained scenario, a short-term conflict resolved within a month would push energy

title_cn: 中东冲突威胁泰国GDP，或导致经济萎缩2.31%
summary_cn: 泰国商会大学（UTCC）经济与商业预测中心分析指出，若中东冲突未能解决，泰国GDP可能面临高达2.31%的缩减。该中心提出了三种预测场景：从短期一个月内解决对能源价格的轻微波及，到冲突长期化导致的严重经济危机。目前中东局势的演变正成为除全球贸易变动外，影响泰国今年及明年经济增速的关键负面因素。

title: 3月14日更新：泰国各主要加油站燃油价格调整详情
desc: March 14 update: petrol prices revised across major stations Legacy Thailand’s Energy Policy and Planning Office has updated fuel prices for today, March 14, covering five major petrol stations: PTT, Bangchak, PT, Caltex, and Shell. Diesel B7 is uniformly priced at 29.94 baht per litre across all five stations. Standard Gasohol 95 is also consistent at 31.05 baht per litre at PTT, Bangchak, PT, and Caltex, while Shell prices it higher at 32.35 baht per litre. title_cn: 3月14日更新：泰国各主要加油站燃油价格调整详情
summary_cn: 泰国能源政策与规划办公室发布3月14日最新油价，涵盖PTT、Bangchak、PT、Caltex和Shell五大加油站。B7柴油统一为29.94泰铢/升。Standard Gasohol 95除Shell售价32.35泰铢/升外，其余四家约为31.05泰铢/升。此外，PTT的Gasohol 91售价为30.68泰铢/升，E20和E85分别为27.84和25.79泰铢/升。建议在泰自驾人士通过比价选择合适油站。

title: 春武里男子通过iCloud追踪定位 发现失踪女友已身亡
desc: Man discovers girlfriend's body via iCloud in Chon Buri Legacy A man was left in shock after using iCloud to locate his 27 year old girlfriend, who was found deceased in a room in Nong Prue subdistrict, Bang Lamung district, Chon Buri, on Thursday, March 13, at 9.06pm. Police from Nong Prue police station responded to the scene alongside rescue services from Sawang Boriboon Foundation in Pattaya . title_cn: 春武里 Chon Buri 男子通过iCloud追踪定位，发现女友已身亡
summary_cn: 3月13日晚，春武里府（Chon Buri）邦拉蒙县 Nong Prue 区发生悲剧。一名男子通过 iCloud 查找我的设备功能追踪失联的27岁女友，最终在一间房内发现其已身亡。芭提雅明满善坛救援队与警方赶赴现场调查。目前警方已封锁现场对死亡原因进行详细勘查，初步推断死者在男子抵达前已去世。此事件引发当地社会对独居安全及数字定位协助寻人的关注。

title_cn: 芭提雅音乐节火热持续：第二周中天海滩（Jomtien Beach）唱响海滨旋律
desc_original: The Pattaya Music Festival 2026, themed around the city's rhythmic coastal energy, continues to draw large crowds eager for live music against the scenic backdrop of Jomtien Beach. With more weekends ahead—including upcoming stops at Koh Larn and Lan Pho Na Klua Public Park—the festival is set to keep the beats going strong all month long.
summary_cn: 2026年芭提雅音乐节（Pattaya Music Festival）进入第二周，活动正在风景优美的中天海滩（Jomtien Beach）如火如荼地进行。本次音乐节以海洋节奏为主题，吸引了大量游客参与。未来几周，音乐节还将陆续移师格兰岛（Koh Larn）和那库阿（Lan Pho Na Klua）公共公园，整个三月芭提雅都将沉浸在音乐盛宴中。

title_cn: 全泰包括曼谷（Bangkok）在内的29个府份需防范雷阵雨
desc_original: Thailand’s Meteorological Department has issued a weather warning for today, March 14, forecasting thunderstorms across 29 provinces, including Bangkok and surrounding areas, driven by a moderate high-pressure system from China pushing easterly and southeasterly winds over upper Thailand. Over the next 24 hours, rainfall is expected to ease across upper Thailand, though isolated thunderstorms remain likely. The central region, Bangkok, and the eastern provinces will see hot daytime conditions. Residents are advis
summary_cn: 泰气象局发布天气预警，受来自中国（China）的中等高压系统影响，包括曼谷及周边在内的泰国29个府份将迎来雷阵雨。受东风和东南风影响，泰国上部地区降雨虽有望在24小时内减弱，但局部仍有雷雨。中部、曼谷及东部地区白天体感炎热。提醒民众防范局地强降雨及可能伴随的雷电天气。

title: 曼谷 Dib Bangkok 现代美术馆落成：仓库改造的艺术新地标
desc_original: Explore Dib Bangkok, a new contemporary art museum in a converted warehouse – its inaugural exhibition is showcasing works by 40 artists until August 3.
summary_cn: 位于曼谷的新当代艺术博物馆 Dib Bangkok 近期开幕，该馆由旧仓库建筑改造而成，极具现代设计感。其首展汇集了40位艺术家的杰作，展出将持续至8月3日。该馆的落成不仅为曼谷增添了核心文化地标，也成为艺术爱好者和游客在泰国的打卡新选择。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: 监察员申请宪法法院裁定：大选选票上的条形码是否违宪
desc_original: The Ombudsman has resolved to petition the Constitutional Court to rule on whether the use of barcodes and QR codes on ballot papers in Thailand’s Feb 8 general election violated the constitutional requirement that voting be conducted directly and by secret ballot.
summary_cn: 针对泰国2月8日举行的全国大选，监察员已决定向宪法法院提交请愿书。核心争议在于选票上使用的条形码（Barcode）和二维码（QR Codes）是否违反宪法关于“直接且秘密投票”的原则。此举可能对选举结果的合法性及泰国未来的投票程序产生长远影响。

title: 民众党数据泄露引发追责呼声：成员面临身份失窃风险
desc_original: The People’s Party is facing more calls to answer questions about the safety of its members after it admitted to a data breach that put them at risk of identity theft and scams.
summary_cn: 泰国人民党（People’s Party）在承认发生数据泄露事故后，面临强烈的问责呼声。此次泄露导致该党成员面临严重的身份验证信息被窃取的风险，极易遭受电信诈骗。外界要求该党就其会员资料库的安全性给出明确说法，此事件引发了公众由于信息安全对政治组织的信任危机。

title: 泰国政府拟进口俄罗斯原油，汽油价格或将上调
desc: The government is ready to purchase crude oil from Russia and has signalled plans to raise petrol prices after the diesel price cap ends on Monday, while officials have also moved to clarify concerns over rising refining margins.
desc_original: The government is ready to purchase crude oil from Russia and has signalled plans to raise petrol prices after the diesel price cap ends on Monday, while officials have also moved to clarify concerns over rising refining margins.
summary_cn: 泰国政府已准备好从俄罗斯购买原油，以应对全球能源压力。随着周一柴油价格上限补补贴政策结束，官方释放出上调汽油价格的信号。与此同时，相关部门官员正就炼油利润率上涨及其引发的公众担忧进行澄清。该举措旨在平抑能源成本，但也可能直接导致在泰生活成本上升。

title: 泰股大盘受地缘政治阴云困扰，指数波动明显
desc: The Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) ended February with high hopes at 1,528.26 points, up 15% from the month before. The post-election rally continued after the Bhumjaithai Party won convincingly and moved quickly to form a coalition with a solid majority.
desc_original: The Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) ended February with high hopes at 1,528.26 points, up 15% from the month before. The post-election rally continued after the Bhumjaithai Party won convincingly and moved quickly to form a coalition with a solid majority.
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易所（SET）在二月收盘表现强劲，涨幅达15%，主要受大选后泰自豪党（Bhumjaithai Party）获胜并快速筹建多数派执政联盟的利好驱动。然而，国际地缘政治风险加剧，阴云笼罩股市，尽管目前政治局面稳定，但外部战争风险仍对大盘未来的持续增长潜力构成挑战。

title: 泰国自建房市场潜力巨大，吸引大型开发商入场
desc: Although the self-built home market is sizeable, with an annual value of up to 200 billion baht, residential developers had largely overlooked the segment until last year when a handful of large and mid-sized developers entered the fray.
desc_original: Although the self-built home market is sizeable, with an annual value of up to 200 billion baht, residential developers had largely overlooked the segment until last year when a handful of large and mid-sized developers entered the fray.
summary_cn: 泰国自建房市场规模每年高达2000亿泰铢，长期以来该领域一直被主要开发商忽视。然而，随着市场竞争加剧，从去年起一批中大型房地产开发商开始入场。这一细分市场的爆发反映了泰国居民住房需求的多样化，也预示着房地产行业未来在定制化住宅方向上的增长潜力。

title: 应对中东冲突影响，泰旅局拟推旅游刺激措施
desc: To mitigate the tourism impact from the Middle East conflict, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) plans to propose to the cabinet a stimulus measure for the short-haul and domestic markets, as well as setting up a "war room" in collaboration with private operators.
desc_original: To mitigate the tourism impact from the Middle East conflict, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) plans to propose to the cabinet a stimulus measure for the short-haul and domestic markets, as well as setting up a "war room" in collaboration with private operators.
summary_cn: 为减轻中东冲突对泰国旅游业造成的负面影响，泰国国家旅游局（TAT）计划向内阁提交针对短途市场和国内市场的刺激方案。此外，泰旅局还将与私人运营商合作建立“应急室”（War Room），实时监控行业波动。该举措旨在填补长途游客减少的缺口，优先保障国内旅游经济稳定性。

title: 商会大学：中东冲突或致泰国GDP缩减2.31%
desc: A worst-case scenario for the Middle East conflict, which is war dragging on without a clear end, would reduce Thai GDP by 2.31 percentage points, according to the Center for Economic and Business Forecasting at the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC).
desc_original: A worst-case scenario for the Middle East conflict, which is war dragging on without a clear end, would reduce Thai GDP by 2.31 percentage points, according to the Center for Economic and Business Forecasting at the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC).
summary_cn: 泰国商会大学（UTCC）经济与商务预测中心指出，在中东冲突演变为旷日持久战争的最坏情况下，泰国GDP增长可能被削减2.31个百分点。该评估主要基于能源成本飙升、出口受阻及全球消费信心下降等因素。这对于正处于恢复期的泰国经济增长目标构成了重大挑战。

title: 遭袭货轮上3名泰国籍船员确认生还
desc_original: Three Thai sailors remain alive aboard the damaged cargo ship MV Mayuree Naree after it was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, according to Adm Thadawut Thatphithakkul, chief of staff of the Royal Thai Navy.
title_cn: 被袭货船上3名泰国籍船员确认生还
summary_cn: 泰国皇家海军参谋长塔达武海军上将（Adm Thadawut Thatphithakkul）证实，其所属的受损货轮“MV Mayuree Naree”号在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）遭受袭击后，船上的三名泰国籍船员目前依然生还。军方正在密切关注局势进展并协调后续安全事宜。此次袭击凸显了该航道日益严峻的安全局势及对泰国航运人员的影响。

title: Thai crypto scandals shake investor trust
desc_original: Two high-profile cryptocurrency scandals involving Worawat Naknawdee, a prominent digital asset investor, and Kampanat Vimolnoht, a former director linked to a venture capital arm of Kasikornbank, have sparked debate among Thai investors over trust, insider networks and risks in the fast-growing crypto market.
title_cn: 泰国两起数字货币丑闻重挫投资者信心
summary_cn: 近期两起备受关注的加密货币丑闻引发了广泛讨论。涉事人员包括知名数字资产投资者 Worawat Naknawdee，以及曾任职于开泰银行（Kasikornbank）旗下风投机构的前董事 Kampanat Vimolnoht。这些事件暴露了泰国高速发展的加密市场在内部网络、信任机制及投资风险方面的漏洞，促使泰国投资者重新评估数字货币投资的安全性及市场透明度。

title: Tattoo artist accuses Russian tourist of groping her in Pattaya, CCTV captures incident
desc_original: A tattoo artist files a complaint at Pattaya City Police Station after accusing a Russian tourist of groping her outside her shop on Soi 5 off Pattaya Second Road, with CCTV footage submitted to police as evidence. PATTAYA, Thailand – A 23-year-old tattoo artist filed a police complaint after alleging that a Russian tourist groped her outside her shop in Pattaya, with the incident captured clearly on CCTV.
title_cn: 纹身师控诉俄罗斯游客在芭提雅对其非礼 监控录像还原过程
summary_cn: 在芭提雅二路（Pattaya Second Road）5巷，一名23岁的纹身师向芭提雅市警察局报案。她指控一名俄罗斯游客在其店铺门口对其进行猥亵摸索。受害者 Kunsiri 已将监控录像完整提交给警方作为证供。监控图像清晰记录了事发经过，目前警方正以此为线索追查嫌疑人。此类涉及外国游客的基础治安事件在当地引起关注。

title: Pattaya officials respond after couple sleeping outside shop scares off customers
desc_original: Officials from the Pattaya City Municipal Enforcement Department speak with a man and a woman found sleeping outside a shop in Pattaya after complaints from business operators that the situation was discouraging customers from entering the premises. PATTAYA, Thailand – Officers from Pattaya City Municipal Enforcement Department were called to inspect an area outside a local shop on March 13.
title_cn: 芭提雅男女露宿店外惊扰顾客 城管部门介入处理
summary_cn: 3月13日，芭提雅市城市执法部门接到多名商业经营者投诉，称一对男女长期露宿在店铺门外。店主表示，这种情况制造了不适氛围，严重阻碍顾客进店，损害生意。执法人员随后赶赴现场，对这两名露宿者进行了谈话劝离和妥善安置。该事件反映了旅游区公共管理与流浪人口问题的矛盾，市府正加强街道巡逻维护环境。

title: 5-year-old boy’s ankle trapped in motorcycle wheel, rescuers rush to help near Pattaya
desc_original: Rescue workers assist a five-year-old boy after his ankle became trapped in the wheel of a Honda Wave motorcycle along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip, near Pattaya, before cutting the spokes to safely free his leg. PATTAYA, Thailand – Rescue workers rushed to assist a five-year-old boy whose ankle became trapped in the wheel of a motorcycle along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip.
title_cn: 芭提雅附近发生意外 5岁男童脚踝卡进摩托车轮
summary_cn: 在靠近芭提雅的梭桃邑（Sattahip）素坤逸路（Sukhumvit Road）段，发生一起幼童乘车事故。一名5岁小男孩在搭乘本田 Wave 摩托车时，脚踝不幸被卡入车轮辐条内。Sawang Rojanathammasathan 救援队的救援人员接到报警后迅速赶到，通过剪断车轮辐条才安全将其救出。此次事故再次引发了当地社会对儿童骑行安全教育及保护措施的关注。

PATTAYA, Thailand – A man was killed after his pickup truck lost control and overturned before crashing into a roadside power pole along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip, near Pattaya, on the evening of March 12. Police from Na Jomtien Police Station were alerted to the accident at about 7:40 p.m. and rushed to the scene along with rescue workers from the Sawang Rojanathammasathan. The
summary_cn: 3月12日晚，在芭提雅（Pattaya）附近的梭桃邑（Sattahip）素坤逸路（Sukhumvit）发生致命车祸。一名男子 Wittaya Kaokhem 驾驶海拉克斯皮卡车为避让路面交通锥桶，失控翻转并猛烈撞击路边电线杆。由于撞击猛烈，驾驶员当场身亡。纳考姆（Na Jomtien）警方及救援组织赶赴现场处理，事故导致该路段交通一度受阻。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）整治帕塔纳克山（Pratumnak Hill）公园流浪狗引发的蜱虫瘙痒问题
desc_original: Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, leads city veterinary and botanical teams spraying insecticide at a park on Pratumnak Hill to eliminate ticks and fleas linked to stray dogs and reduce the impact on residents exercising in the area. PATTAYA, Thailand – Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, led a team of veterinary officials and city botanical staff to tackle a tick and flea problem linked to stray dogs at a public park on Pratumnak Hill after complaints from residents and people exercising in the area. City officials carried out insecticide spraying around the park and captured severa
summary_cn: 针对居民反映帕塔纳克山（Pratumnak Hill）公园流浪狗导致的蜱虫和跳蚤滋生问题，芭提雅副市长 Manot Nongyai 带领兽医及园林团队对公园进行了大规模杀虫剂喷洒。此举旨在改善市民锻炼环境，减少寄生虫对人类及宠物的健康威胁。行动中还捕捉了部分带病流浪狗进行后续处理，确保公共区域卫生安全。

title: 燃油价格上涨威胁萨美桑（Samae San）渔民生计，芭提雅海鲜恐调价
desc_original: Prasert Pitakkorn, president of the Chong Samae San Fisheries Association, speaks about the impact of rising fuel prices on fishermen in Samae San, warning that escalating Middle East tensions could increase operating costs for fishing boats and eventually push seafood prices higher in nearby Pattaya. PATTAYA, Thailand – Escalating military tensions in the Middle East involving the United States, Israel, and Iran are beginning to ripple through the global economy, particularly in the energy sector, with fishermen in Thailand already feeling the impact. The conflict has disrupted oil exports fr
summary_cn: 受中东地区紧张局势加剧影响，全球能源成本大幅波动。曼谷周边的萨美桑（Samae San）渔业协会警告，柴油价格上涨正显著提高出海捕捞成本。如果油价持续走高，芭提雅（Pattaya）市场的生鲜海产品价格将不可避免地随之上调。目前渔民面临运营困境，正密切关注能源市场动态以调整生计策略。

title: 强降雨导致梭桃邑（Sattahip）多处内涝，湿冷天气将持续至周末
desc_original: Heavy rain leaves sections of road flooded in Sattahip, Chonburi Province, slowing traffic and making travel difficult for motorists as wet weather continues across the area. PATTAYA, Thailand – Heavy rainfall lashed parts of Sattahip in Chonburi Province on Friday, causing water to accumulate in several areas and creating difficult travel conditions for motorists and residents. Downpours left standing water along a number of main roads and within local communities, forcing cars and motorcycles to slow down and leading to intermittent traffic congestion in parts of the district. Drivers were s
summary_cn: 受热带低压影响，春武里府梭桃邑（Sattahip）周五遭遇持续强降雨。多条主要路段及居民区出现严重积水，部分道路水深导致摩托车及小型车通行受阻。气象部门预报，此类降雨天气将持续至3月15日本周末，由于排水缓慢，当地交通可能持续拥堵，提醒过往司机谨慎驾驶并避开低洼路段。

title: 保险监管委员会在芭提雅（Pattaya）开展慈善活动，捐赠自行车及康复物资
desc_original: Damrongkiat Pinijkarn, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, receives CSR donations including pillows for bedridden patients and bicycles for underprivileged children from representatives of the Office of the Insurance Commission during a seminar at Holiday Inn Pattaya. PATTAYA, Thailand – Damrongkiat Pinijkarn, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, together with Panrada Attohi, Deputy Permanent Secretary of the city, received donated items during a Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activity held as part of an onboarding seminar for new personnel from the Office of the Insurance Commission (OIC). The event took pla
summary_cn: 泰国保险委员会（OIC）在芭提雅假日酒店（Holiday Inn）举办研讨会期间，联合开展了企业社会责任（CSR）捐赠活动。芭提雅副市长 Damrongkiat 接受了捐赠的长期卧床病患专用枕头及贫困儿童自行车等物资。这些物资将通过市政系统发放给当地弱势群体，体现了公共部门与社会机构的协作帮扶精神。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）东部铁路沿线道路翻新工程将于3月20日启动
desc_original: Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, chairs a meeting at City Hall to review progress on road improvement projects, including the eastern railway parallel road set to begin construction on March 20. PATTAYA, Thailand – Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, chaired a meeting to monitor progress on several road improvement projects across the city, with a key focus on the long-awaited upgrade of the eastern railway parallel road. The meeting took place at Pattaya City Hall on March 13 and brought together officials from the city’s Engineering Department, Sanitation Engineering Division, rep
summary_cn: 芭提雅副市长 Manot Nongyai 于3月13日主持会议，确认东部铁路平行道路的升级工程将于3月20日正式动工。该项目是芭提雅多项道路改善计划的重点，旨在提升城市交通效率。相关部门包括工程部及卫生工程局共同参与进度审查。此工程将影响铁路沿线交通，提醒居民及常驻外籍人士关注潜在的交通绕行，该基建补强被视为改善旅游城市排水及路况的关键举措。

title: 治理芭提雅（Pattaya）绝非易事：市长谈旅游增长与居民需求的平衡
desc_original: Poramet Ngampichet, known locally as “Mayor Beer,” continues his work overseeing development and community issues in Pattaya, where supporters say leadership requires balancing tourism growth with the needs of local residents. PATTAYA, Thailand – As one of Thailand’s most dynamic tourist destinations, Pattaya requires a style of city management that goes beyond routine administrative procedures. Governing the city means navigating a complex landscape that includes the tourism economy, local entrepreneurs, long-established communities, and the constant pressures that come with rapid urban devel
summary_cn: 绰号“Beer市长”的芭提雅市长 Poramet Ngampichet 近期就城市治理发表看法。作为泰国的动态旅游枢纽，芭提雅的管理涉及错综复杂的利益，包括蓬勃的旅游经济、本地企业家利益、长期居住社区以及快速城市化带来的压力。市长支持者指出，其领导力体现在如何平衡旅游业扩张与改善当地居民生活质量。报道反映了该市在转型为世界级旅游目的地过程中所面临的行政和社会治理挑战。

title: 伊朗使馆就“泰籍海员遭袭”发不当笑话引发泰国网民强烈抗议
desc_original: The Iranian embassy in South Africa has removed a social‑media post about Thai seafarers rescued after their ship was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz, saying it was meant as humour and not to offend Thai people, following angry backlash in Thailand.
summary_cn: 伊朗驻南非大使馆撤回了一篇涉及泰籍海员的社交媒体帖文。此前一艘载有泰籍员工的船只在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）附近遭袭，使馆发布的调侃内容引发了泰国社会的强烈不满。伊朗方面解释称该帖文旨在幽默而非冒犯，但在遭遇大面积舆论控诉后已将其删除。此次事件凸显了中东局势敏感背景下，外籍劳工安全问题在泰国国内的高度敏感性。

title: 曼谷 MBK 购物中心遭扫黄打非，查获 3000 万铢假货
desc_original: More than 100,000 counterfeit goods worth about 30 million baht have been seized during a raid at MBK Center in Bangkok as authorities step up action against intellectual property violations.
summary_cn: 泰国当局近期加大了对知识产权侵权行为的打击力度，突击搜查了曼谷著名的 MBK 购物中心。此次行动共查获超过10万件假冒伪劣商品，总价值估计达3000万泰铢。 MBK 一直以来以销售价格低廉的仿制品闻名，此次大规模执法行动释放了政府整顿商业环境、打击非法贸易的信号。提醒游客在购买名牌商品时警惕低价陷阱，规避此类打击行动带来的潜在纠纷。

title: 泰选委会小组撤销对 229 名参议员选举舞弊嫌疑人的指控
desc_original: Disappointment and criticism are mounting after reports that an Election Commission (EC) subcommittee has voted to clear all 229 suspects in the high-profile Senate election collusion case, prompting calls for the commission to disclose its reasoning.
summary_cn: 泰国选举委员会（EC）一个小组投票决定撤销对229名参议员选举串通案嫌疑人的指控，此举引发社会各界的广泛失望与强烈批评。该案件涉及此前参议院选举期间的高度关注的舞弊举报。公众和监督机构目前正敦促选委会公开其判决理由。这一裁决对泰国政治透明度和选举公平性产生了重大冲击，可能引发后续法律申诉或社会抗议。

title: 曼谷公交车多次拒绝载客，残障人士轮椅拦路抗议引发关注

The Mirror Foundation posted the clip on its official Facebook page, showing a disabled man in a wheelchair struggling to get a bus stop. summary_cn: 3月12日，一段曼谷残障人士在轮椅上拦路阻挡公交车的视频在社交媒体疯传，引发了对泰微笑巴士（Thai Smile Bus）的强烈批评。据悉，该男子在公交站多次尝试搭乘均被无视，最终被迫采取极端方式。泰國镜子基金会（Mirror Foundation）公开此视频并抨击虽然公共交通标榜“为民设计”，却拒绝履行基本服务，反映了曼谷无障碍交通系统的失效。
title_cn: 曼谷公交车因拒绝载客残障人士遭抨击 (Bangkok Public Bus)

summary_cn: 3月11日凌晨约4点55分，曼谷拍那空区（Phra Nakhon）三森3巷（Soi Samsen 3）的一座两层商业建筑发生火警。一名勇敢的外籍男子发现火情后，逐户叫醒居民并协助包括一名残障人士在内的民众紧急疏散。大火波及了数栋相连的排屋，消防员耗时30分钟控制。该外籍人士的行为因防止了潜在的人员伤亡而受到当地居民和网民的高度赞誉。
title_cn: 外籍英雄在曼谷三森路（Samsen Road）火灾中协助居民疏散

title: 普吉岛逮捕一名法国籍国际刑警红通嫌犯

summary_cn: 3月12日，普吉岛移民局警方在拉威区（Rawai）成功抓获一名被国际刑警组织（Interpol）通缉的法国籍“红通”嫌犯。此次抓捕是应法国大使馆通过泰国皇家警察外交事务部门发出的正式请求所执行的。该男子目前已被撤销在泰停留许可，并将根据法定程序遣返回法国受审，涉嫌案件详情尚未完全披露。
title_cn: 法国籍红通嫌犯在普吉岛拉威（Rawai）落网

title: 2026年改善空气质量（BAQ）国际会议在曼谷举行

The conference served as a key platform for governments, research institutions and international organisations to share strategies aimed at improving air quality and protecting public health. summary_cn: 2026年改善空气质量（Better Air Quality, BAQ）会议在曼谷正式拉开帷幕，汇集了来自亚洲及全球的决策者、科学家和环境专家。本次大会旨在应对亚洲日益严峻的PM2.5及空气污染挑战，重点探讨减少碳排放的实用方案、强化环境政策以及推广清洁能源技术。会议为多国政府和科研机构提供了一个分享治理经验和保护公众健康策略的关键平台。
title_cn: 2026年改善空气质量会议（BAQ）在曼谷探讨污染治理方案

title: 芭提雅警方抓获一名向青少年兜售笑气的中国籍男子

summary_cn: 3月12日，芭提雅移民局警方通过钓鱼执法成功逮捕一名中国籍男子。该男子通过网络平台公开发布广告，向芭提雅地区的青少年兜售一氧化二氮（俗称“笑气”）。警方此前收到举报，称该男子的非法活动公然无视泰国法律并在社交网络广泛传播。目前，该嫌疑人已因违反药事健康相关法案被扣押，将面临泰国司法起诉及随后的驱逐出境处理。
title_cn: 中国籍男子因在芭提雅（Pattaya）向青少年贩卖笑气被捕

title: 在泰国当老师全攻略：入职流程、薪资水平及所需材料必备清单

Day 4: Sanctuary of Truth: Visit the stunning wooden temple and learn about traditional Thai craftsmanship. Day 5: Coral Island (Koh Larn): Take a day trip to Coral Island for snorkeling and beach relaxation. Day 6: Pattaya Floating Market: Experience local foods and crafts at the floating market. Day 7: Art in Paradise: Have fun with interactive 3D art exhibits.
summary_cn: 2026最新芭提雅（Pattaya）七日游路线出炉。攻略重点推荐了东芭乐园（Nong Nooch Garden）的植物景观、真理寺（Sanctuary of Truth）的精湛木雕工艺、格兰岛（Koh Larn）的水上运动以及水上市场（Floating Market）的特色美食。此外，互动艺术馆 Art in Paradise 也是亲子出游的热点，为游客提供了详尽的芭提雅全方位游玩指南。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: AI 浪潮推动泰国科技投资激增
desc: IT spending in Thailand is expected to reach almost 1.1 trillion baht in 2026, up 8.36% year-on-year, thanks to artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure investment, according to the latest forecast by business tech and insight firm Gartner.
desc_original: IT spending in Thailand is expected to reach almost 1.1 trillion baht in 2026, up 8.36% year-on-year, thanks to artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure investment, according to the latest forecast by business tech and insight firm Gartner.
summary_cn: 据商业技术研究机构 Gartner 的最新预测，在人工智能 (AI) 基础设施投资的推动下，泰国 2026 年的 IT 支出预计将达到近 1.1 万亿泰铢，同比增长 8.36%。这一增长反映了泰国企业向数字化转型的迫切需求，尤其是在数据中心和云服务领域的投入显著增加，正成为泰国经济增长的新支柱。

title: 泰国政府推行居家办公政策，交通及传媒股应声下跌
desc: Thailand's temporary work-from-home (WFH) policy for government agencies, introduced as part of emergency energy-saving measures, creates short-term pressure on transport and out-of-home media stocks, according to analysts.
desc_original: Thailand's temporary work-from-home (WFH) policy for government agencies, introduced as part of emergency energy-saving measures, creates short-term pressure on transport and out-of-home media stocks, according to analysts.
summary_cn: 作为紧急节能措施的一部分，泰国政府宣布针对政府机构推行临时居家办公 (WFH) 政策。分析师指出，该政策减少了通勤需求和户外流动力，短期内对公共交通类股票及户外媒体广告类股票造成了明显压力，投资者需警惕相关板块的波动。对于在泰通勤者而言，短期内交通拥堵情况或有缓解。

title: 外资持有泰股比例创新高，1月达6.11万亿泰铢
desc: Foreign investor holdings in Thai stocks reached a new record high of 6.11 trillion baht in January, representing 37.1% of the total market capitalisation and reflecting growing overseas interest in the equities market, says the Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET).
desc_original: Foreign investor holdings in Thai stocks reached a new record high of 6.11 trillion baht in January, representing 37.1% of the total market capitalisation and reflecting growing overseas interest in the equities market, says the Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET).
summary_cn: 据泰国证券交易所 (SET) 统计，今年 1 月外资持有的泰国股票总额飙升至 6.11 万亿泰铢的纪录高点，占市场总市值的 37.1%。这一现象反映出海外资本对泰国股票市场的兴趣日益浓厚，显示了外资对泰国经济基本面及市场潜力的信心，也为泰国金融市场注入了更强的流动性。

title: 中东局势趋紧，近千名泰籍员工渴望回国
desc: Nearly 1,000 Thai workers in the Middle East have expressed a desire to return home amid the escalating regional conflict, according to the Ministry of Labour.
desc_original: Nearly 1,000 Thai workers in the Middle East have expressed a desire to return home amid the escalating regional conflict, according to the Ministry of Labour.
summary_cn: 泰国劳工部表示，由于中东地区冲突不断升级，目前已有近 1000 名在当地工作的泰籍劳工表达了回国意愿。泰国政府正与驻外使领馆密切协作，准备为这些希望撤离的人员提供必要的援助和回国路径指导。这反映了近期地缘政治风险对泰国海外劳动力安全产生的直接负面影响。

title: 泰证监会对币圈名人 Acme Traderist 采取法律行动
desc: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has reaffirmed that legal action was already taken against cryptocurrency promoter Worawat Narknawdee, widely known as "Acme Traderist", following renewed public attention and additional complaints from alleged victims.
desc_original: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has reaffirmed that legal action was already taken against cryptocurrency promoter Worawat Narknawdee, widely known as "Acme Traderist", following renewed public attention and additional complaints from alleged victims.
summary_cn: 针对公众高度关注的加密货币推广者 Worawat Narknawdee（外号 Acme Traderist），泰国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 证实已正式采取法律行动。近日受害者投诉增加令该案重回视线，案件涉及在该国未受监管的加密资产交易行为及相关欺诈指控。此举彰显了泰国监管机构严厉打击虚拟货币及金融诈骗的决心。

title: PTG 能源因应地区冲突计划提高成品油储备
desc_original: PTG Energy Plc, the operator of PT petrol stations, has announced plans to expand its refined oil reserves in line with a government directive aimed at safeguarding national energy security during the ongoing US-Iran conflict.
title_cn: 泰国 PTG 能源公司确认增加成品油储备以应对地缘冲突风险
summary_cn: PT 加油站的运营商 PTG Energy Plc 宣布，计划按照政府指令扩大其成品油储备。此举旨在美伊冲突持续期间保障泰国的国家能源安全。通过增加燃油库容，该公司旨在缓解国际局势动荡对国内油价及供应稳定性可能造成的冲击，确保泰国能源市场的日常运作不受外部安全因素干扰。

title: Delivery firms cut costs by embracing AI tech
desc_original: KEX Express (Thailand) and J&T Express Thailand are increasingly deploying artificial intelligence (AI) and route optimisation to reduce their energy waste, improve fleet efficiency and maintain service stability for the rapidly growing e-commerce sector amid volatile fuel prices.
title_cn: 泰国快递巨头 KEX 与极兔借助人工智能（AI）技术削减成本
summary_cn: 泰国快递运营商 KEX Express 与极兔速递（J&T Express Thailand）正加大对人工智能（AI）及路由优化技术的应用。在目前油价波动剧烈且电商行业快速发展的背景下，此举旨在减少能源浪费、提升车队运行效率，并确保末端物流服务的稳定性。通过数字化转型，两家公司致力于在竞争激烈的货运行业中实现降本增效。

The beachside event will feature a mix of T-POP, rock, and hip-hop artists performing live in front of the sea, bringing together locals and visitors for a lively night of music in Pattaya. title_cn: 2026 芭提雅音乐节本周末回归中天海滩 (Jomtien Beach)
summary_cn: 2026 芭提雅音乐节（Pattaya Music Festival）将于本周末（3月13-14日）在中天海滩（Jomtien Beach）开启第二周的演出。目前海滩沿线舞台已搭建完毕，多位泰国知名艺人将带来包括 T-POP、摇滚和嘻哈在内的多元表演。这项大型滨海盛会将面向市民及游客免费开放，预计将吸引大量人流，为芭提雅夜间旅游注入活力。

title_cn: 泰国酒店协会东部分会选举 Watcharapong 博士为新任主席

location_detail: 扎恩泳池别墅酒店 The Zign Pool Villa

title_cn: 芭提雅议会推进格兰岛 (Koh Larn) 新制水计划以解决缺水危机
summary_cn: 针对格兰岛（Koh Larn）长期存在的淡水短缺问题，芭提雅市议会近期在会议上敦促加快制水系统的开发进程。议员 Wasan Sukkee 指出，缺水已严重影响当地居民生活及日益增长的旅游业务。议会要求政府加快对早前延迟的项目进行可行性研究和施工报批，旨在彻底改善岛上的供水系统，确保护航格、兰岛的旅游承载力。

According to Pol. Col. Parinya Klinkesorn, spokesperson for Immigration Bureau Division 3, investigators carried out
summary_cn: 泰国移民局第三分局突袭了芭提雅（Pattaya）的一处民宅，捣毁了一个由中国籍人士经营的非法网络销售团伙。该团伙涉嫌向当地青少年出售笑气和非法电子烟产品。行动中，警方逮捕了一名中国籍嫌疑人，并现场缴获了一支手枪、子弹以及大量违禁品。目前此案由移民局发言人帕林亚（Parinya Klinkesorn）警上校负责跟进，旨在打击危害社区安全的非法贸易。

summary_cn: 芭提雅市政厅正在推进收回公共用地及拓宽道路的项目。工作人员开始对Soi Pornprapanimit 2巷沿线的违规占地建筑进行清理。在拆除路边神龛前，芭提雅市政厅基础设施发展总监提普猜（Thipchai Rattanaveerathavorn）遵循泰国传统习俗进行祭拜，以示尊重。此举既展现了地方官员对传统信仰的敬畏，也标志着城市基础建设项目的稳步实施。

The robbery, captured on CCTV, happened on the evening of March 11. The suspect, described as
summary_cn: 3月11日晚，佛统府（Nakhon Pathom）一间商场内的金店发生恶性抢劫案。一名头戴头盔的持枪歹徒平静闯入店内，威胁员工将金项链装袋。在逃离现场时，嫌疑人还开了一枪示威，随后骑摩托车逃逸。此次抢劫共掠走重约46铢的黄金首饰，价值约350万泰铢。目前警方正通过监控摄像追踪该嫌疑人。此类案件频繁发生再次引发了对商场安保水平的关注。

title: 中东局势加剧担忧：泰国密切监控航司燃油供应及价格走势

PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s aviation authorities are monitoring jet fuel prices amid concerns that tensions in the Middle East could affect global energy markets and the aviation sector. The Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT) held a meeting on March 11 to assess the situation surro
summary_cn: 受中东地区紧张局势影响，泰国正严密监控航空燃油供应情况，以防全球油价波动冲击本土航空业。3月11日，泰国中央民航局（CAAT）副局长萨伦（Sarun Benjanirat）召集泰国国家石油公司（PTT）及邦查克（Bangchak）等能源巨头召开紧急会议，评估市场风险。泰国政府旨在确保民航业运行稳定，防止因中东冲突导致的燃料短缺或成本激增影响国际旅游业务的恢复。

title: 普吉岛 Sensei Padel 俱乐部：芭东（Patong）下班后运动与桑拿新去处

summary_cn: 3月12日芭提雅（Pattaya）降雨后，市政府官员已全员出动，严密监控市内易涝路段。包括纳库鲁阿（Naklua）和中天（Jomtien）在内的执法小组已在关键节点驻守，随时观测积水情况并协助过往车辆，以确保交通安全。此次行动旨在应对短时强降雨可能导致的街道内涝，将对市民和游客日常出行的影响降至最低，目前官员仍保持高度警惕。

title: 诺博地产（Noble）坚持轻资产战略，寻求合资及公寓租赁合作伙伴
desc_original: SET-listed Noble Development plans to maintain its asset-light strategy by seeking partners for joint ventures in new projects and investors to purchase rental condo units, a business it launched late last year.

summary_cn: 泰国气象局发出夏季风暴预警，预计未来24小时内泰国上部地区及芭提雅（Pattaya）等沿海城市将出现雷阵雨、阵风和局部大雨。尽管目前芭提雅海滩游客云集，天气炎热，但气象专家提醒注意天气突变。夏季风暴通常伴有剧烈天气变化，建议在泰游客关注最新气象信息，在强风或雷雨发生时避免停留在空旷地带或简易棚下。此轮不稳定天气由季节更替引起。

title: 阿努廷（Anutin）确认执政联盟组建完成，排除民主党及 Klatham 党
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has confirmed that the government coalition lineup has been finalised, with the main partners being the Bhumjaithai Party and the Pheu Thai Party, along with several smaller parties.
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）公开确认，新一届政府执政联盟的职能名单已最终敲定。核心合作伙伴为自豪泰党（Bhumjaithai）和为泰党（Pheu Thai），并辅以数个小型政党。阿努廷明确表示，由于组阁已趋于稳定和完善，排除目前将 Klatham 党和民主党（Democrat Party）纳入联盟的可能性。此番表态旨在展示现任政府的团结，并平息关于政治权力分配的各类猜测。

summary_cn: 泰国国民党（People’s Party）近日因泄露党员个人激光代码（Laser ID）而公开道歉。该党承认在收集成员信息过程中存在疏忽，导致敏感信息面临暴露风险，可能增加身份被盗用和网络诈骗的威胁。激光代码通常印在泰国身份证背面，属于高等级隐私数据。此举旨在提醒受影响成员加强警惕，防止因个人资料被不当利用而造成经济损失。
